notes: Completed skill refinement after reviewing the M3 baseline corpus ingestion failure modes. Updated pkcs-ingest to distinguish single-file and batch/public corpus modes, prefer .venv CLI for Windows long batches, require source validation and smoke batches, define timeout/retry policy, document Docling fallback boundaries, and allow CLI-equivalent ingest when MCP tools are not exposed.
